title: A Curtain Raiser
overview: Bruno is waiting for his girlfriend Rosette to arrive at his apartment. He loves her deeply but is infuriated that she is at least 45 minutes late EVERY SINGLE TIME they are supposed to meet, leading him to wonder how can she love him if she is that selfish, and how he can respect himself for putting up with it. He makes a decision to terminate the relationship if she is that late this time.
